nasb.text: He brought me out by way of the north gate and led me around on the outside to the outer gate by way of the gate that faces east. And behold, water was trickling from the south side.

esv.text: Then he brought me out by way of the north gate and led me around on the outside to the outer gate that faces toward the east; and behold, the water was trickling out on the south side.

cnv.text: 他又帶我從北門出來，再領我從外面繞到朝東的外門。有水正從右邊流出來。

ccb.text: 随后他领我由北门出来，从外面绕到外院的东门，我见水从东门的南面涓涓流出。
